effect_en: immobilize or ground an enemy champion grants 10 bonus armor and bonus magic resistance for 10 seconds, stacking up to 10 times for a total of 100 bonus resistances, and refreshing on subsequent triggers (5 second cooldown per cast instance).
suggested_effect_zh: 定身或禁锢敌方英雄时，获得10点额外护甲和魔法抗性，持续10秒，最多叠加10次，共100点额外双抗，后续触发时刷新（每次施法5秒冷却）。

effect_en: Increases attack damage by 20%.
suggested_effect_zh: 攻击力提升20%。

effect_en: Grants 60% bonus attack speed.
suggested_effect_zh: 获得60%额外攻击速度。

effect_en: Each instance of damage dealt to an enemy reduces their armor and magic resistance by 1.5% for 4 seconds, stacking up to 20 times for a total of 30% resistances reduction.
suggested_effect_zh: 每次对敌人造成伤害时，使其护甲和魔法抗性降低1.5%，持续4秒，最多叠加20次，共降低30%双抗。

effect_en: Grants 20% heal and shield power.
suggested_effect_zh: 获得20%治疗与护盾强度。

effect_en: Gain 15% omnivamp.
suggested_effect_zh: 获得15%全能吸血。

effect_en: Gain 100% bonus movement speed. This bonus is lost for 6 seconds after taking damage from champions.
suggested_effect_zh: 获得100%额外移动速度。受到英雄伤害后此加成失效6秒。

effect_en: Immobilize or ground an enemy champion heal you for 30 to 250 (+ (5 second cooldown per cast instance).
suggested_effect_zh: 定身或禁锢敌方英雄时，为你治疗30至250点生命值（每次施法5秒冷却）。

effect_en: Your champion abilities deal 35% increased damage and you gain 70 ability haste and 35% increased heal and shield from all sources, but your ultimate ability is permanently lockout.
suggested_effect_zh: 你的基础技能伤害提升35%，获得70点技能急速和35%来自所有来源的治疗与护盾增强，但你的终极技能将被永久锁定。

effect_en: Upgrades your Mark into a massive snowball, empowering it with an increased size radius and the ability to pass through non-champions. The snowball additionally explodes upon impact of the target hit to deal magic damage (+ 100% bonus AD) (+ 60% AP) magic damage to all nearby enemies, airborne for 0.75 seconds, and slow}} them by 20% for 2 seconds. Additionally, your {{sis cooldown is reduced equivalent to 100 ability haste. If Mark is not equipped, you will be prompted to replace one of your summoner spells with Mark. Non-champions hit by the snowball are stun for 1.25 seconds.
suggested_effect_zh: 将你的标记升级为一个巨大的雪球，增大命中半径并可以穿过非英雄单位。雪球命中目标后爆炸，对附近所有敌人造成魔法伤害（+100%额外攻击力）（+60%法术强度），击飞0.75秒并减速20%持续2秒。此外，你的标记冷却时间缩减相当于100点技能急速。如果未装备标记，系统将提示你用标记替换一个召唤师技能。被雪球命中的非英雄单位会被眩晕1.25秒。

effect_en: Heal and health regeneration you do causes you to deal 70% of that value in magic damage to the nearest enemy champion within 1000 units.
suggested_effect_zh: 你的治疗和健康回复效果会使你对1000码内最近的敌方英雄造成该数值70%的魔法伤害。

effect_en: Scoring a champion takedown}} grants you {{as and 15% total attack speed for 4 seconds.
suggested_effect_zh: 参与击杀英雄后，获得攻击速度和15%总攻击速度，持续4秒。

effect_en: Grants 35% bonus health, 15% adaptive force, and 50% increased size.
suggested_effect_zh: 获得35%额外生命值、15%自适应之力和50%体型增大。

effect_en: Replace a summoner spell with Growth Spurt. 20px|link= Growth Spurt: geteffect
suggested_effect_zh: 将一个召唤师技能替换为急速生长。

effect_en: Your champion's first basic ability (Q) gains 100 ability haste.
suggested_effect_zh: 你的英雄第一个基础技能（Q）获得100点技能急速。

effect_en: Your next basic attack against an enemy champion in each cardinal direction within attack range additionally on-attack fires 5 Firecrackers at the target that each deal physical damage (+ 14% bonus AD) physical damage, for a total of physical damage (+ physical damage (5 second cooldown per direction). Firecrackers' damage is increased by type=distance travelled. Each Firecracker can critically strike}} for {{critical damage damage and applies on-hit effects at 20% effectiveness.
suggested_effect_zh: 对攻击范围内的敌方英雄进行普攻时，在每个十字方向上的下一次普攻额外发射5发鞭炮，每发造成物理伤害（+14%额外攻击力），每个方向5秒冷却。鞭炮伤害随飞行距离增加。每发鞭炮可以暴击并附带20%攻击特效。

effect_en: Gain 1500 bonus health, but reduce your damage output by 10%.
suggested_effect_zh: 获得1500点额外生命值，但你的伤害输出降低10%。

effect_en: Gain the Hail of Blades and Press the Attack keystone runes.
suggested_effect_zh: 获得丛刃和强攻两个基石符文。

effect_en: Abilities with dash or blink gain 175 ability haste.
suggested_effect_zh: 拥有冲刺或闪现效果的技能获得175点技能急速。

effect_en: Upon death, you explode to deal true damage equal to 20% of the target's maximum health to enemies within 500 units.
suggested_effect_zh: 死亡时爆炸，对500码内的敌人造成相当于目标最大生命值20%的真实伤害。

effect_en: Your basic attacks and abilities execute}} enemy champions below (+ 2% per 1000 bonus health) of their maximum health, which causes their corpse to be sent flying away in a line. Upon collision with an enemy champion or terrain, the target's corpse explodes to deal magic damage (+ 100% bonus armor) (+ 100% bonus magic resistance) magic damage to nearby enemies. Successful executions heal}} you for {{pp (+ 25% bonus health). The execution may also be triggered by the explosion and goes through shields.
suggested_effect_zh: 你的普攻和技能对低于一定生命值百分比（+每1000额外生命值增加2%）的敌方英雄执行，使其尸体沿直线飞出。尸体撞击敌方英雄或地形后爆炸，对附近敌人造成魔法伤害（+100%额外护甲）（+100%额外魔抗）。成功执行后为你恢复生命值（+25%额外生命值）。执行也可由爆炸触发且无视护盾。

effect_en: Deal 10% increased damage to enemies below 30% of their maximum health. Scoring a champion takedown resets the cooldown of all your basic abilities.
suggested_effect_zh: 对生命值低于最大生命值30%的敌人造成10%额外伤害。参与击杀英雄后重置所有基础技能的冷却时间。

effect_en: Deal 1% increased damage per 10 movement speed you have more than the target.
suggested_effect_zh: 你的移动速度每比目标高10点，造成的伤害提升1%。

effect_en: Casting your ultimate grants you invulnerability for 2 seconds (8 second cooldown).
suggested_effect_zh: 施放终极技能后获得2秒无敌效果（8秒冷却）。
